description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to any branch and tags v*.*, snapshot-*, tptlibsdev-*, and on any pull request. The workflow has three jobs: prepare, build, and publish. The prepare job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, runs a prepare script, and creates a release. The build job uses a matrix to build the project on different platforms, and the publish job uses another matrix to publish the build artifacts. The release job runs a release script if publishing is enabled.
